title: Vanity: Deep Forged
description: A trio of weapon skin packs with dwarvish origins.
body:
# Vanity: Deep Forged
An addon for **Vanity: Core** which adds three new looks for your tools and weapons. The three designs all have a fantasy dwarven theme, and can be bought from stylist villagers.

The three designs added are:
## Deep Forged 
A design with a rough and tumble appeal, giving your tools and weapons a rugged dwarvish appearance. This design adds:
- Deep forged variants for all tools, applicable to iron, gold, diamond, and netherite.
- Deep forged crossbows, shears, and shields!

And three special 3D weapon skins!
- The morningstar, which can be applied to axes made from iron, gold, diamond, or netherite.
- The hammer, which can be applied to axes and pickaxes made from iron, gold, diamond, or netherite.
- The cudgel, which can be applied to swords and axes made from any material, wood and stone included.
## Stygian Brass
A design with a more refined appearance, offering a sleek brass arsenel for your adventures. This design adds:
- Stygian brass variants for all tools, applicable to iron, gold, diamond, and netherite.
- Stygian brass crossbows and shears.
## Glassteel Blade
A design which brings your tools a mythic quality, formed of a material as sharp as glass, but not nearly so brittle. This design adds:
- Glassteel variants for all tools, applicable to gold, diamond, and netherite.
- Glassteel shears!
